feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Scientific Workflows on the Eve of the Butlerian Jihad

link.title: Scientific Workflows on the Eve of the Butlerian Jihad

entry.content: <iframe id="post-iframe" src="/assets/posts/scientific-software/index.html" style="width: 100%; height: 8000px; border: none; display: block; overflow: hidden;" scrolling="no" title="Scientific Workflows on the Eve of the Butlerian Jihad"></iframe> <script>!function(){function t(){try{var t=e.contentDocument.documentElement.scrollHeight;t>100&&(e.style.height=t+"px")}catch(t){}}var e=document.getElementById("post-iframe");e.addEventListener("load",function(){t(),setTimeout(t,500),setTimeout(t,1500),setTimeout(t,4e3)})}();</script>
entry.summary: A practical manifesto for scientific software in the era of vibecoding: let's write beautiful code while we still can.

entry.title: Generalization Error via the Replica Method

link.title: Generalization Error via the Replica Method

entry.content: <iframe id="post-iframe" src="/assets/posts/generalization-error/index.html" style="width: 100%; height: 5000px; border: none; display: block; overflow: hidden;" scrolling="no" title="Generalization Error via the Replica Method"></iframe> <script>!function(){function t(){try{var t=e.contentDocument.documentElement.scrollHeight;t>100&&(e.style.height=t+"px")}catch(t){}}var e=document.getElementById("post-iframe");e.addEventListener("load",function(){t(),setTimeout(t,500),setTimeout(t,1500),setTimeout(t,4e3)})}();</script>
entry.summary: A statistical-physics treatment of high-dimensional learning using the replica method from disordered systems.
